zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Aubeny於大約1364年出生在英國波藍德阿爾斯通時，她的父親Giles Daubeney31歲，母親Lady Alainore de Willington28歲。她和Raynold Hughes至少有1個兒子。她去世於1420年在英國波藍德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Aubeny于大约1364年出生在英国波藍德阿爾斯通时，她的父亲Giles Daubeney31岁，母亲Lady Alainore de Willington28岁。她和Raynold Hughes至少有1个儿子。她去世于1420年在英国波藍德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aubeny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Aubrey
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name Albry, Aubry, or Aubery, a borrowing of Old French Alberi, Aubri (from ancient Germanic Alberic, which is composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ and ric ‘powerful’).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Albrey, Aubrey, a borrowing from Old French Albree, Aubree, Auberee (from ancient Germanic Albrad(a)).

English: variant of Abery, a habitational name from a local pronunciation of Avebury, Wiltshire. The placename derives from Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’, with an uncertain first element, possibly the Old English personal name Afa.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Aubeny was born about 1364, in Alston, Cumberland, England, her father, Giles Daubeney, was 31 and her mother, Lady Alainore de Willington, was 28. She had at least 1 son with Raynold Hughes. She died in 1420, in Cumberland, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Aubeny est née environ 1364, à Alston, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Giles Daubeney, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Alainore de Willington, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Raynold Hughes. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Aubeny um 1364 in Alston, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Giles Daubeney 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Alainore de Willington 28. Sie hatte mit Raynold Hughes mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Aubeny è nata il circa 1364 nel Alston, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Giles Daubeney, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Alainore de Willington, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Raynold Hughes. Morì nel 1420, nel Cumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aubenyが約1364年にイギリスクウンバーランドアルストンで生まれた時，父Giles Daubeneyは31歳，母Lady Alainore de Willingtonは28歳であった。彼女はRaynold Hughesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1420年にイギリスクウンバーランドで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aubeny(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 쿠벌랜드 알스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Daubeney(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alainore de Willington(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Raynold Hughes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Aubeny nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Alston, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Daubeney, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alainore de Willington, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Raynold Hughes. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Aubeny родилась около 1364 г. в местности алстон, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Daubeney было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alainore de Willington, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Raynold Hughes. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Aubeny nació aproximadamente 1364, en Alston, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Giles Daubeney, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Alainore de Willington, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Raynold Hughes. Murió en 1420, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
